mapper.select: SELECT p.productName, p.price, P.price * (1 - (D.discountRate*0.01)), P.price*(IFNULL(D.discountRate, 0)*0.01), CONCAT(ROUND(D.discountRate), '%'), D.discountRate, m.materialName, ps.sizeName, c.orderMemo, c.quantity FROM userCart C JOIN product P ON C.productSeq = P.productSeq JOIN material M ON C.productSeq = M.productSeq JOIN productSize PS ON C.productSeq = PS.productSeq; LEFT JOIN discount D ON P.discountSeq = D.discountSeq WHERE C.userSeq = #{userId}
